name: autopilotops-self-healing-platform
description: Self-healing operations platform for technical and business workflows.

scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace packages/shared run lint && npm --workspace apps/api run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace packages/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/api run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck
scripts.test:integration:ci: docker compose up -d postgres redis && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate:deploy && RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true npm --workspace apps/api run test:integration
scripts.dev:full: npm run docker:up && npm run dev:api
